t: Cuptor cu aer cald iHunt Bro Pizza Air Fryer ULTRA FAST
Cuptor cu microunde Daewoo KOR-AF25BKX functie Air Fryer, control digital, 25 litri, 850 W, Grill 1200 W, convectie 2200 W, 8 retete presetate, 5 niveluri de putere, platou rotativ de 31.5 cm (Negru)
Cuptor cu aer cald iHunt Bro Pizza Air Fryer ULTRA FAST 3 in 1, 13 l, 2100 W, 18 programe, Control digital touch (Negru/Argintiu)
Friteuza fara ulei-Cuptor cu aer cald, Air Fryer HAUSBERG HB-2370, 12 programe, capacitate 12L, putere 1800-2000W, reglare temperatura 80-200°C Engros
